jsonLd.title: AIIMS is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
